The iframe element is not necessarity contained in the listing, it is somewhere in the html document

Ok, we don't need the iframe code anymore. Instead, for each listing we find that has a status that is not 'draft', we need to click its [more options] button which will open a popup, wait 2 seconds and continue. The more options button will be a 'div' element that contains an 'aria-label' attribute that starts with 'More options for '.

now instead of waiting for 2 seconds after click the button, wait 250ms then find the <div> element with the attribute role="menu" the class="html-div" and the attribute of 'aira-label' that starts with "more options for listing". this element will have an <a> element with the role="menuitem" a tabindex="-1" and an attribute of 'href' that starts with "/marketplace/item/<listing_id_goes_here>/". We want to extract the listing id and save it to this listing as listingId if the current listingId is empty or null
click the buttton, wait 1 second, extract the listingId and the "url" from the href to save to the listing object, then close the the popup by clicking the button again.
